capital.summary: Eli Lilly and Company announced an additional $4.5 billion investment across two of its three Lebanon sites in Indiana, bringing the company's total Indiana capital expansion commitments since 2020 to more than $21 billion. This investment includes a new dedicated genetic medicine manufacturing facility and further expansion of its active pharmaceutical ingredient (API) site.
capital.project_name: Eli Lilly Indiana Manufacturing Expansion (Lebanon Sites)
capital.value: $4.5 billion (additional investment), over $21 billion (total Indiana commitments since 2020)
capital.timeline: Ongoing expansion; Lilly Lebanon Advanced Therapies (genetic medicine manufacturing facility) opened May 6, 2026; Lilly Lebanon API (active pharmaceutical ingredient site) expected to open in 2027.
capital.why_it_matters: This significant expansion of manufacturing and genetic medicine facilities will generate substantial demand for a wide array of lab supplies, reagents, consumables, and scientific equipment for pharmaceutical production and research.

capital.summary: The University of Guelph received a $51 million donation from Stu and Kim Lang's Angel Gabriel Foundation to fund a major expansion of the Gordon S. Lang School of Business and Economics. The expansion will include a new three-story student-focused building with modern classrooms, over 60 study/breakout rooms, an event space, a 500-seat lecture hall, and a dedicated finance teaching and research lab.
capital.project_name: University of Guelph Gordon S. Lang School of Business and Economics Expansion
capital.timeline: The new gift will fund the expansion.
capital.why_it_matters: The development of new classrooms, study spaces, and a dedicated finance teaching and research lab within the business school may create demand for general lab supplies, educational equipment, and specialized research tools.

contract.summary: Cellares and ProTgen announced a partnership to automate the manufacturing and quality control of ProT-096, ProTgen's personalized progenitor T cell therapy for patients with refractory leukemia and other hematologic malignancies. Cellares will apply its fully automated Cell Shuttle® and Cell Q™ platforms and provide regulatory support for an Investigational New Drug (IND) application.
contract.contract_name: Partnership to Automate Manufacturing and Quality Control of ProT-096
contract.why_it_matters: This partnership indicates an upcoming demand for specialized lab supplies, reagents, and equipment required for automated cell therapy manufacturing and quality control processes.

contract.summary: Cabaletta Bio and Cellares entered into a 10-year commercial supply agreement for the automated manufacture of rese-cel (resecabtagene autoleucel), Cabaletta's investigational CAR T cell therapy for autoimmune diseases. The agreement utilizes Cellares' automated Cell Shuttle™ and Cell Q™ platforms to enable the production of thousands of batches per year with minimal capital investment and aims for among the lowest per-batch costs in the industry.
contract.contract_name: 10-Year Commercial Supply Agreement for Rese-cel Manufacturing
contract.why_it_matters: This long-term commercial supply agreement signifies a substantial and sustained demand for cell therapy manufacturing and quality control consumables, reagents, and equipment for a high-volume therapeutic program.

pipeline.summary: Cellares and Cabaletta Bio Inc. signed a 10-year commercial supply agreement for the automated manufacture of rese-cel (resecabtagene autoleucel), an investigational CAR T cell therapy for autoimmune diseases.
pipeline.stage: Investigational CAR T cell therapy, commercial supply agreement for manufacturing. Clinical development program (RESET clinical program).
pipeline.why_it_matters: This long-term commercial supply agreement indicates a significant increase in manufacturing demand for rese-cel, requiring substantial lab supplies, reagents, and consumables for automated CAR T cell therapy production.

funding.summary: Cellares and Cabaletta Bio Inc. announced a 10-year commercial supply agreement for the automated manufacturing of rese-cel, an investigational CAR T cell therapy for autoimmune diseases.
funding.use_of_proceeds: Utilization and expansion of Cellares' Cell Shuttle and Cell Q automated manufacturing platforms and IDMO Smart Factories to meet long-term commercial supply demand for rese-cel.
funding.why_it_matters: This long-term agreement signals significant future demand for Cellares' automated manufacturing platforms, leading to increased procurement of lab supplies, reagents, and consumables for large-scale cell therapy production.

project.summary: Cellares signed a 10-year commercial supply agreement with Cabaletta Bio for the automated manufacture of rese-cel.
project.project_name: Commercial Supply Agreement for rese-cel manufacturing
project.scope: Automated manufacture of rese-cel (resecabtagene autoleucel), Cabaletta's investigational CAR T cell therapy for autoimmune diseases, enabling thousands of batches per year.
project.why_it_matters: This long-term agreement for high-volume manufacturing indicates significant demand for Cellares' automated cell therapy platforms, reagents, and consumables.

project.summary: Cellares partnered with ProTgen to automate manufacturing and quality control of ProT-096, a novel personalized progenitor T cell therapy.
project.project_name: Automation of ProT-096 manufacturing and quality control
project.scope: Automating manufacturing and quality control of ProT-096, ProTgen's personalized progenitor T cell therapy for patients with refractory leukemia and other hematologic malignancies. Cellares will also provide regulatory support to ProTgen in the drafting of an Investigational New Drug application.
project.why_it_matters: This new partnership for automating manufacturing of a novel cell therapy suggests demand for specialized scientific equipment and reagents for cell therapy development and production.

ai_summary: Cellares is rapidly expanding its automated cell therapy manufacturing services through new partnerships with ProTgen and Cabaletta Bio. They are leveraging their Cell Shuttle and Cell Q platforms for personalized progenitor T cell and CAR T cell therapies. This significant growth in manufacturing contracts for advanced therapies means increased demand for specialized lab supplies, reagents, media, and consumables, presenting a strong sales opportunity for supporting their expanding operations.
